title: Vantage Liquidity Edge
author: TheRealDrip2Rip
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Vantage Liquidity Edge by TheRealDrip2Rip.
ABOUT Vantage Liquidity Edge is an intraday positioning indicator that integrates dynamic level projections with liquidity sweep detection for a complete market structure overview.

It uses kinetic energy, volume entropy, and price cycles to create adaptive support and resistance levels based on golden ratio expansions, overlaid with echo zones from confirmed liquidity sweeps that adjust with retests.
